name: UploadCheck NPO Pipeline Handoff
description: Focused callable runbook for NPO podcast/audio production pipelines that need UploadCheck before publishing.

launch_preflight.rule: For launch-sensitive production, stop if product_hunt_ready is not true or remaining_blockers is not empty; fetch the handoff and report proof commands.

cost_preflight.minutes_source: Use known episode duration when available; otherwise estimate from the audio file before upload.
cost_preflight.rule: Run cost preflight before sending large audio or adding model-backed checks such as garble or omni_watch.

media_ingress.small_or_medium_audio: Use qc_run_local_file; the MCP/CLI encodes reachable local audio inline when it fits the inline limit.
media_ingress.large_audio: Use signed upload: POST /v1/uploads, PUT /v1/uploads/{upload_id}/content, then POST /v1/qc/jobs with upload_id.
media_ingress.queued_render_worker: Use process_async=true only with durable media and HTTPS sidecar URLs: transcript_url, watchlist_url, expected_script_url, and chunk_sidecars_url.
media_ingress.privacy: Job/report responses expose sanitized mediaIngress and sidecarIngress metadata only; temporary server paths and raw sidecar URLs are not returned.

required_sidecars.transcript_path: Final transcript for spoken_leaks, pronunciation_watchlist, and script_faithfulness.
required_sidecars.watchlist_path: Names, sponsor terms, organization names, and banned misrenders.
required_sidecars.expected_script_path: Locked script or rundown when available.
required_sidecars.sidecar_dir: Optional dialogue/audio chunk QC sidecar directory for failed rerender or garble reports.

mcp_sequence.purpose: Load the full production runbook when the caller needs launch, cost, media, report, marker, and repair-loop instructions.
Read profile npo_podcast_or_audio and confirm the default checks and sidecar arguments.
Poll until completed, failed, or blocked.
Fetch verdict, flags, cost estimate, mediaIngress, sidecarIngress, observability, and repair guidance.
Fetch timestamped editor/audio handoff markers when flags exist.

repair_loop_contract.user_prompt: Show all QC flags and ask: Fix now?
repair_loop_contract.completion_rule: Do not call the episode publish-ready until UploadCheck is rerun after edits and no BLOCK flags remain.

margin_rule: The default deterministic NPO profile is margin-safe under the current cost model; model-backed garble or omni_watch must remain preflighted, downgraded, blocked, or sold separately when needed.
public_moat_rule: Expose the NPO handoff sequence, defect categories, and repair behavior; do not publish private thresholds, fixtures, prompts, or validator internals.
